documentation.description:
RTK GPS data. Gives information on the relative baseline calculation the
GPS is reporting

record_types.name: Gps2_Rtk

fields.name: Time_Last_Baseline_Ms
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time since boot of last baseline message received.

fields.name: Wn
fields.description: GPS Week Number of last baseline

fields.name: Tow
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
GPS Time of Week of last baseline

fields.name: Rtk_Health
fields.description: GPS-specific health report for RTK data.

fields.name: Rtk_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [Hz]
Rate of baseline messages being received by GPS

fields.name: Nsats
fields.description: Current number of sats used for RTK calculation.

fields.name: Baseline_A_Mm
fields.description:
Units: [mm]
Current baseline in ECEF x or NED north component.

fields.name: Baseline_B_Mm
fields.description:
Units: [mm]
Current baseline in ECEF y or NED east component.

fields.name: Baseline_C_Mm
fields.description:
Units: [mm]
Current baseline in ECEF z or NED down component.

fields.name: Iar_Num_Hypotheses
fields.description: Current number of integer ambiguity hypotheses.

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

subprograms.name: Check_CRC

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
